completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part. Pre-implementation project (planning artifacts only, no source code). Primary type: data, secondary: backend.

Found 13 existing documentation files: 1 product brief, 1 PRD, 1 architecture doc, 1 UX design, 2 research docs, 1 brainstorming session, 2 validation reports, 1 stakeholder review, 1 implementation readiness report, 1 backlog, 1 sprint change proposal.
Tech stack: Python 3.13+, OpenFisca (adapter), uv, pytest, ruff, mypy. Data: CSV/Parquet. Architecture: Layered with adapter pattern.
Conditional analysis: No source code to scan. Project is pre-implementation. All analysis based on planning artifacts.
Source tree documented: current structure (BMAD framework + planning artifacts) and planned source layout (8 subsystem directories).
Development guide written with planned setup, tooling, CI strategy, and architecture guidelines for developers.
Architecture documentation generated from planning artifacts: layered design, adapter pattern, orchestrator, subsystems, data contracts.
Supporting docs generated: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, development-guide.md, planning-artifacts-inventory.md.
Master index generated at docs/index.md with links to all generated docs and planning artifacts.
Workflow complete. 6 documentation files generated in docs/.

findings.project_classification: Monolith, 1 part, Python 3.13+, OpenFisca-first environmental policy platform, greenfield pre-implementation
findings.technology_stack: Python 3.13+, OpenFisca via adapter, uv, pytest, ruff, mypy, CSV/Parquet
findings.existing_docs: 13 planning artifacts found across product brief, PRD, architecture, UX, research, validation, and implementation planning
